NO SURPRISE GUARANTEE

PEACE OF MIND GUARANTEE

title: Request for SEO Review Call – Bruni and Campisi
description:
Hi, this is inline w/ the chat query I sent. Just adding this too here as reference for this coming monthly call.

Hi Clayton,
I’ve noticed a decline in organic traffic for Bruni and Campisi and wanted to share a few observations:
  • Our Contact Us and Homepage URLs are showing a decrease in clicks, and overall clicks are down too.
  • There’s been a drop in average position from 20 to 24.
  • We’re also seeing a decline in rankings for some keywords. While the numbers aren’t huge, the change is significant enough to look at.
Could we schedule a 30-minute call to review our SEO plan and identify the gaps or opportunities for improvement? Please let me know your availability, and I’ll send over a calendar invite. 


We have a call w/ them too this coming: 
Wednesday, December 10⋅2:00 – 3:00pm

Thanks much!

CC

title: Site query related to Nav section change
description:
Seeking help w/ a client query please. This is related to the nav change done on their site: Site Architecture Revamp - J363 Bruni & Campisi

Last 13-March the client emailed us that something changed on their site specifically the Nav section. We found out that it was an intentional update from SEO team from 10-March: Navigation section issue - J363 Bruni & Campisi

We provided the info that it was an intentional update and gave the reason behind the changes including the files. Client just replied today with some queries. Adding the verbatim below for reference:
Thank you so much for sharing the detailed report and the context behind the navigation and architecture changes, I appreciate the document with details from the SEO team.

But could you please let me know how much longer the navigation is expected to remain in its current state.
I’m concerned this may impact site performance in the short term, especially since Bruni & Campisi is a priority brand for us and is already facing challenges with lead volume.

It would be really helpful if you could check with the team on the expected timeline for stabilization or full implementation, and also share any updates on whether there are mitigation steps in place to minimize potential performance impact during this transition.

Thanks much

title: Some 'suggestions' from Tulasi on how to improve SEO...
assignees: Alina Neamtu, Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Keith Bruss, Predrag
description:
Just left here for discussion and a repository for her comments. My comments in green...

-------------

One page is missing a meta description, and multiple pages have long H1s, titles, and meta descriptions that should be revised. (https://www.bruniandcampisi.com/bedford-ny-plumbing-hvac/). This is an SEO issue and has been passed to our team.

Many pages have Duplicate H1s and images like these. This is an SEO issue and has been passed to our team.

https://www.bruniandcampisi.com/home-maintenance-program/
https://www.bruniandcampisi.com/rebates-and-financing/ (These both pages are having same content with URLs being different) This was caught on the call last night and is now fixed.

https://www.bruniandcampisi.com/stayhome/
https://www.bruniandcampisi.com/surplus-sale/ (Same)

33 images are currently missing alt text. This is an SEO issue and has been passed to our team.
